title: server.rs: actor_uri needlessly owned String
description:
src/server.rs lines 805-810

actor_uri is constructed via .split('#').next()...to_string() from sig_parts.key_id (&str). It is never moved — only borrowed at all subsequent call sites (get_public_key, invalidate, SQL bind, log fields). Could be &str with lifetime tied to sig_parts, eliminating one heap allocation per inbox request.

Impact: one String allocation per authenticated inbox request (verify path). Minor but genuine idiom miss.
close_reason: Documented: comment explains actor_uri must be owned across await points
